message: borrow of `x` escapes its region in `f`: `x` is a block-local binding so the returned `shared` reference would dangle
expected: return an owned value, or borrow a binding that outlives the block
found: `shared` borrow of block-local `x` returned from the enclosing block

fixes.description: Return `x` by value instead of borrowing it.

patch.intent: Stop returning a borrow of the block-local `x` from `sym:diag.b0080_escapes_region.f`.

agent.summary: Return `x` by value or extend its lifetime; the current borrow escapes its source region.
